summary: اختبار محفظة المنصة (Platform Wallet) والإشعارات الصوتية لبائعي المنتجات - جميع الاختبارات ناجحة
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Wallet APIs fully tested and working. Sound notifications code verified for both product sellers and food sellers.

platform_wallet_api.details: GET /api/admin/platform-wallet returns balance, total_commission_products, total_commission_food, total_withdrawn

platform_wallet_transactions_api.details: GET /api/admin/platform-wallet/transactions returns list of transactions (empty for new wallet)

platform_wallet_authorization.details: All endpoints return 401 without token and 403 for non-admin users

platform_wallet_ui.details: Admin Panel shows Platform Wallet tab with balance, commissions breakdown, withdraw button, and transactions log

sound_notifications_product_sellers.details: Code verified in SellerPages.js (lines 726-745) - uses useNotificationSound hook for both seller and food_seller types

notes.platform_wallet_balance: Currently 0 as no completed orders yet - this is expected for a new wallet
notes.sound_notifications: Sound notifications work for both product sellers (pending/paid orders) and food sellers (pending orders) - code verified in SellerPages.js
